sections.paragraph:
Original: אכן

Transliteration: 'âkên

Phonetic: aw-kane'

BDB Definition:

  1. surely, truly, indeed
    1. truly, indeed (strong assertive force)
    2. but indeed, but in fact (emphasizing a contrast)

Origin: from H3559 [compare H3651]

TWOT entry: 86

Part(s) of speech: Adverb
